An [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] who was the '''grandfather''' of [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] once told [[Gender/Legends|his]] grandson the tale of how the Ewoks migrated from the forest of [[Desert of Simoom|Simoom]] to the other side of the moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[How the Ewoks Saved the Trees: An Old Ewok Legend]]'' {{1stm}}
